description_long: This is a hard-shell rolling suitcase with a quilted, diamond-patterned red exterior and yellow trim accents. The suitcase features a telescopic black and yellow handle on top, which is retractable for easy maneuvering. Four black wheels with yellow detailing are attached at the base, allowing for smooth rolling in any direction. A prominent yellow zipper runs along the perimeter, indicating a main compartment that opens around the edge. The suitcase has a rectangular shape with rounded corners, and a small gold-colored plaque is visible on one side, possibly for branding. The overall design is modern and stylish, suitable for urban travel.
description: A red, diamond-patterned hard-shell suitcase with yellow trim, a telescopic handle, and four wheels. Features a perimeter zipper and a gold plaque on one side.
description_view_0: Side view showing the quilted red surface, yellow zipper, and two wheels at the base.
description_view_1: Handle-side view displaying the telescopic handle, black and yellow handle grip, and two front wheels.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the zipper and wheels visible.
description_view_3: Back view showing the gold plaque, quilted pattern, and two rear wheels.
attribute_handle_type: single telescopic retractable handle on top
attribute_brand_logo: gold plaque on back side, brand name not legible
attribute_zipper_configuration: single zipper track running around the perimeter for the main compartment, double zipper pulls
